title: Software Update - DFU - Animations on Software Update screen
scenario: Verify animations on the Software Update screen during DFU, including slide transitions and animated picture on the Updating screen.
steps: Navigate to HS device settings and open SW update tab, click Update button → Software Update screen slides in from the right.
Tap Continue → Three Easy Steps screen slides in from the right.
Tap back arrow → Software Update screen slides in from the left.
Go to Three Easy Steps screen and tap 'Start Update' → Updating screen slides from the right, picture in the middle is animated.
expected: All animations (slide transitions and picture animation) play smoothly and correctly.
